interpretation_correction.a4_a5: A4 and A5 are the same bundled intervention by construction and produce byte-identical daily series. They do not independently isolate a structural core, and A5 is not proven equivalent to CleanCoreV2A.
interpretation_correction.pnl_attribution: The bundled guard intervention removed approximately 93-96% of fitted absolute PnL while also removing approximately 95-96% of trade activity. This establishes dependence of fitted PnL volume on the bundled coordinate and auxiliary engines, not the causal share of predictive edge attributable to memorized constants.
interpretation_correction.toggle_semantics: The toggles disable complete rule families, including coordinate, structural, sizing, re-entry, add-on, reversal, split, and support-reclaim behavior. Some direct hour checks were not removed. This is not a constants-only ablation.

surprise: A0 parity passed; coordinate attribution measured with switch-gated copy and paired daily block bootstrap.

A0_full_copy.label: A0 all bundled production engines ON

A4_no_coordinate_layers.label: A4 bundled guard: disable shared hour, price, and slot families plus associated auxiliary behavior

A5_core_only.label: A5 bundled guard legacy label; byte-identical to A4, not an isolated structural core
